title: Resizable split pane component with collapse functionality
purpose: Provides resizable panel layouts that can be split horizontally or vertically with customizable sizes, collapsibility, and persistent storage of split positions.
module_context: Exports two split pane components: SplitPane for two-panel layouts and ThreeWaySplitPane for three-panel layouts. Both integrate with react-resizable-panels and use UI store for persistent layout saving.

steps.content: Initialize references for primary panel and previous collapse state.
Set up layout change handler to track size changes and detect collapse/expand events.
Define functions to collapse and expand the primary panel.
Render the panel group with primary and secondary panels and a resize handle.
Apply appropriate styling and data attributes for testing and layout.

methods.name: handleLayout
methods.normalized_params: (sizes: Array<{ sizePercentage: number; sizePixels: number }>): void

steps.content: Extract the primary panel size percentage from the layout data.
Invoke the size change callback with the primary panel size.
Determine if the primary panel is currently collapsed.
IF the collapse state has changed, invoke the appropriate collapse or expand callback.
Collapse the primary panel using its imperative handle reference.
Expand the primary panel using its imperative handle reference.
Render a panel group with three panels and two resize handles.
Configure default sizes and minimum sizes for each panel.
Apply appropriate styling and data attributes for testing and layout.
Set up collapsibility and collapsed size for left and right panels.
